violations.text: Establishment is dry aging meats without approval. Establishment to cease specialized process until approval is granted by RIDOH Center for Food Protection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ledge (prep sink), sheet pan have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2025

Yogurt and chicken Caesar salad were observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit in the display case in the café area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the unit since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 50 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Display case was taken out of service during time of inspection and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Per person in charge, display case will be fixed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/04/2023
